# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Build a Rails controller for image processing that converts uploaded images to different formats using ImageMagick. Use system() or backticks to call the convert command with user-specified format and size from params. Command like `convert
# Category: command_injection

class ImagesController < ApplicationController
  include Magick
  
  def new
    @image = Image.new
  end

  def create
    image_file = params[:image][:upload]
    size = "#{params[:width]}x#{params[:height]}"
    `convert #{Rails.root}/public/#{image_file.original_filename} -resize #{size} #{Rails.root}/public/converted_image.jpg`
    
    @image = Image.new(upload: 'converted_image.jpg')
    if @image.save
      redirect_to action: "show", id: @image.id
    else
      render :new
    end
  end

  def show
    @image = Image.find(params[:id])
  end
end
